HGSS.663.0001:
It really made me angry to lose.
I’ll have to train much harder...\f
Here’s my number. I’m Erin--don’t
forget! Want to battle me again? [0200,0000]
HGSS.663.0002:
I’ll remember to call when I want to
battle again!
HGSS.663.0003:
Oh... I’m sad... If you do want to
battle, come see Erin--that’s me!
HGSS.663.0004:
I want to battle with you again.
Do you want to exchange numbers? [0200,0000]
HGSS.663.0005:
Aww... I lost again!
I wonder how many times that is...\f
Thanks for coming!
Here’s a present!\f
HGSS.663.0006:
What’s up? Wait, are you seriously
calling me from that close by?\r
Are you scared of me or something?\r
Why not talk face-to-face?
HGSS.663.0007:
Erin’s [0100,000A,0000] is much stronger
than before! I should know--I’m Erin!\f
See you. Bye-bye!
HGSS.663.0008:
And, and...\f
I just battled and we defeated a
[0100,000B,0000]!\f
I’ve raised my Pokémon properly!\f
See you. Bye-bye!
HGSS.663.0009:
But, but...\f
A wild [0100,000B,0000] got away from me
again. It’s just not fair!\f
See you. Bye-bye!
HGSS.663.0010:
I’m Erin. Want to battle me again?
I’ll be waiting on [0104,0003,0000]!
HGSS.663.0011:
Oh, [0103,0000,0000]! Come battle Erin!
I’ll be waiting on [0104,0003,0000]!
HGSS.663.0012:
I’m working hard to raise my Pokémon!
Come back for another battle!
